components.specification: For Fourier transforms Fa and Fb, form C = Fa * conjugate(Fb), normalize its nonzero samples to unit magnitude, and inverse transform it to a phase-correlation surface.
R = C / abs(C) only where abs(C) > 1e-12; R is exactly complex zero elsewhere; the DC bin is exactly zero; the frozen annular band mask is applied after normalization.
numpy.fft.ifft2 with default backward normalization; use the real component without clipping or absolute value; array shape is exactly 512 by 512 and indexing is unshifted.
The correlation-surface peak locates cyclic displacement; the project contract fixes signed-index conversion and the meaning of the reported displacement.
Use a deterministic separable three-sample parabolic offset around the integer maximum, not the closed-form historical POC fitting model.
Retain a project-owned physical annulus from 0.5 through 4.0 cycles/mm. This is not the paper's automatically estimated rectangular band.

Rotate representation A over a bounded -20 through +20 degree grid, then optionally evaluate one deterministic parabolic-refinement candidate; this is not a reproduction of the paper's rotation implementation.
Warp project-owned valid masks under the estimated rotation and translation, measure intersection divided by the smaller valid support, and return the frozen low score for overlap below 0.25.

Return peak-to-sidelobe ratio using an 11 by 11 cyclic exclusion square, population sidelobe mean and standard deviation, and a zero score for zero sidelobe variance or insufficient overlap. No decision threshold is present.

components.component: PPI normalization and canonical field of view
components.specification: Resample to 500 PPI, center crop or zero pad onto a 512 by 512 canvas, and propagate a validity mask under the exact physical-scale contract.
Over valid pixels subtract the mean and divide by population RMS when RMS exceeds 1e-12, set invalid pixels to zero, and multiply by a symmetric separable float64 Hann window.

components.component: determinism, tie breaking, failure semantics, and serialization
components.specification: Use float64/complex128 computation, one OpenCV thread, RNG seed zero, fixed candidate order, explicit total tie rules, canonical JSON, deterministic array hashes, and explicit method error codes.

non_claims: No claim of byte-exact historical restoration.
No claim of parameter equivalence to the audited papers.
No threshold calibration, FAR, TAR, ROC, AUC, EER, parameter sweep, or broad benchmark is part of v1 preflight.

integrity.canonicalization: UTF-8 JSON, ensure_ascii=true, keys sorted recursively, separators comma and colon; hash the complete document with integrity.canonical_sha256 omitted
